creator: olivierd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Meta port, x11-wm/xfce4 was not available due to x11-thems/icons-tango failure (in fact, after recent update of graphics/ImageMagick revisions r358176, and r358277).

Packages are only built on Wednestday, so be patient.

For more details, see this page [1] (select your release).

[1] http://beefy2.isc.freebsd.org/bulk/
